stages.name: git-init
stages.command: git config --global --add safe.directory /workspace/project && git config --global user.email 'art-agent@local' && git config --global user.name 'AerArt Agent' && cd /workspace/project && TAG=$(date +%b%d-%H%M | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]') && git checkout -b autoresearch/$TAG && git commit --allow-empty -m 'autoresearch baseline' && echo "Created branch autoresearch/$TAG" && echo '[STAGE_COMPLETE]'
